context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements bundle cart logic: storing bundles as individual line items with a group record, pro-rating discounts across components, and validating availability before adding to cart.

checklist.name: separate line items
checklist.description: Each bundle component is added as an individual cart line item, NOT as a single composite/bundle item

checklist.name: bundle group record
checklist.description: A separate bundle group record (e.g. cart_bundle_groups or equivalent) is created to associate the line items, storing bundlePrice and bundleSavings (or equivalent)

checklist.name: group id on line items
checklist.description: Each component line item is tagged with a bundleGroupId (or equivalent foreign key) linking it to the bundle group record

checklist.name: pro-rated discount
checklist.description: Each component's unit price is discounted proportionally based on its share of the total component sum (not applying equal discount to all items)

checklist.name: pro-rate formula
checklist.description: Pro-rating uses the formula: discountShare = savings * (itemSubtotal / componentSum), where itemSubtotal = unitPrice * quantity

checklist.name: availability check before add
checklist.description: Bundle availability is checked (all components have sufficient stock) before the cart items are created

checklist.name: available = onHand minus reserved
checklist.description: Available stock is computed as onHand minus reserved (not just onHand alone)

checklist.name: unavailable component detail
checklist.description: When a component is unavailable, the response or error identifies which specific component (by variantId or product name) is out of stock

checklist.name: standard variant_id and quantity
checklist.description: Each cart line item has a standard variant_id and quantity field; bundle_group_id is not used for fulfillment logic

checklist.name: server-side pricing recalc
checklist.description: Bundle price is recalculated server-side during add-to-cart, NOT using a client-provided price value

checklist.name: demo output
checklist.description: A runnable demo or test script exists that exercises both a successful add-to-cart and an unavailable-stock scenario
